title: Neuhewen
summary: Neuhewen is a mountain of volcanic origin in the Hegau region (Konstanz district) of southern Baden-Württemberg, Germany. The ruins of Neuhewen Castle are located on top of the mountain.
text: Neuhewen is a mountain of volcanic origin in the Hegau region (Konstanz district) of southern Baden-Württemberg, Germany. The ruins of Neuhewen Castle are located on top of the mountain.
